headline: 'Dr. Doom' on the outlook for jobs: AI will cause 'massive shedding'

headline: Fintech Is Down 17% This Year, but Cybersecurity Tells a Different Story for These 2 ETFs
summary: FINX is down nearly 17% this year while CIBR has lost about 9%. Both funds target the digital economy, but they behave very differently when rates rise and markets get choppy. Global X FinTech ETF (NYSEARCA:FINX) and First Trust NASDAQ Cybersecurity ETF (NYSEARCA:CIBR) each target one of these forces directly. They are not interchangeable, and ...
